diagnostics.duplicate_cell_id_method: pandas stable uint64 hash of every obs index; exact follow-up required if hash duplicates are nonzero

identifier_resolution.reason: OneK1K sample_id denotes a pool shared across donors; the donor-qualified observation ID prevents collisions while retaining source-pool provenance.

evidence_boundary.direct_observation: Current filesystem, manifests/QC tables, and HDF5 structures/metadata
evidence_boundary.provenance_only: Historical raw-count recovery, annotation execution, filtering intent, and merge transformation mechanics
